race.comment: OAK BEACH (8) is racing well without winning, no match for an easy winner at Mornington over 2000m last time but holding second well. The Freedman stable are struggling at the moment but that'll turn and they have a huge chance of getting a win here. NATURAL RULER (4) is another Freedman galloper who is coming off a win at Sale over Rockette, who went on to win well at Flemington. Tough draw but look for him late. RASP (3) won narrowly at Geelong as favourite when last seen and has claims for the double on his preferred wet ground. DURBAN HARBOUR (7) will be fitter off a solid run here fresh, each way chance.
